sentences.arabic: تَتَجَلَّى عَظَمَةُ الإِيمَانِ فِي قُدْرَةِ المُؤْمِنِ عَلَى التَّكَيُّفِ مَعَ تَقَلُّبَاتِ الأَيَّامِ، حَيْثُ يَجْعَلُ مِنْ كُلِّ حَالٍ سَبِيلًا لِلزُّلْفَى عِنْدَ المَوْلَى سُبْحَانَهُ.
sentences.translation: Veličina imana ogleda se u vjernikovoj sposobnosti prilagođavanja životnim promjenama, pri čemu svako stanje pretvara u put približavanja Gospodaru, neka je slavljen On.
sentences.translationEn: The greatness of faith is manifested in the believer's ability to adapt to the fluctuations of time, turning every condition into a means of closeness to the Lord, Glory be to Him.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ وَصَفَ النَّبِيُّ -صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ- شَأْنَ المُؤْمِنِ بِالعَجَبِ، إِذْ إِنَّ أُمُورَهُ كُلَّهَا تَؤُولُ إِلَى الخَيْرِ، وَهَذِهِ خَصِيصَةٌ لَا تَنْبَغِي لِأَحَدٍ سِوَاهُ [أَخْرَجَهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الزُّهْدِ وَالرَّقَائِقِ، حَدِيث رَقْم ٢٩٩٩].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, opisao je stanje vjernika kao zadivljujuće, jer se sve njegove prilike završavaju dobrom, a ta odlika ne pripada nikome osim njemu [Muslim, Knjiga o zuhdu i suptilnostima, hadis br. 2999].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet, peace and blessings be upon him, described the affair of the believer as amazing, for all his matters result in good, and this characteristic belongs to no one but him [Sahih Muslim, Book of Asceticism and Heart-Softeners, Hadith No. 2999].

sentences.arabic: فَإِذَا أَصَابَتْهُ نِعْمَةٌ سَابِغَةٌ أَوْ سُرُورٌ مُبْهِجٌ، قَابَلَ ذَلِكَ بِالشُّكْرِ وَالثَّنَاءِ، فَكَانَ ذَلِكَ خَيْرًا لَهُ فِي دُنْيَاهُ وَآخِرَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ako ga zadesi obilna blagodat ili radosna vijest, on na to uzvraća zahvalnošću i pohvalom, pa to bude dobro za njega i na dunjaluku i na ahiretu.
sentences.translationEn: If an abundant blessing or a joyful event reaches him, he responds with gratitude and praise, and that is good for him in this world and the Hereafter.

sentences.arabic: وَإِذَا نَزَلَتْ بِسَاحَتِهِ ضَرَّاءُ أَوْ حَلَّتْ بِهِ مِحْنَةٌ، تَسَرْبَلَ بِرِدَاءِ الصَّبْرِ وَالاحْتِسَابِ، فَكَانَ ذَلِكَ لَهُ رِفْعَةً وَتَكْفِيرًا لِلسَّيِّئَاتِ.
sentences.translation: A ako ga pogodi nevolja ili iskušenje, on se zaogrne ogrtačem strpljenja i nade u Allahovu nagradu, pa mu to bude uzvišenje i otkup za grijehe.
sentences.translationEn: And if hardship befalls him or a trial descends upon him, he clothes himself in the mantle of patience and seeking reward, and that becomes an elevation for him and an expiation for sins.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذَا المَنْظُورَ الإِيمَانِيَّ يُحَوِّلُ المِحَنَ إِلَى مِنَحٍ، وَيَجْعَلُ مِنَ الأَلَمِ مِعْرَاجًا لِلرُّوحِ نَحْوَ مَقَامَاتِ الرِّضَا بِالقَضَاءِ وَالقَدَرِ.
sentences.translation: Ova vjernička perspektiva iskušenja pretvara u darove, a bol čini ljestvama za dušu prema stepenima zadovoljstva Allahovom odredbom (kada' i kader).
sentences.translationEn: This faith-based perspective transforms trials into gifts and turns pain into a spiritual ascent toward the stations of contentment with Divine Decree and Predestination.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ أَشَارَ شَيْخُ الإِسْلَامِ ابْنُ تَيْمِيَّةَ إِلَى أَنَّ الصَّبْرَ الجَمِيلَ هُوَ الَّذِي لَا شَكْوَى فِيهِ لِلْخَلْقِ، بَلْ يَكُونُ الِالْتِجَاءُ فِيهِ إِلَى الخَالِقِ وَحْدَهُ.
sentences.translation: Šejhu-l-islam Ibn Tejmijje je ukazao na to da je 'lijepo strpljenje' ono u kojem nema žaljenja stvorenjima, već se utočište traži isključivo kod Stvoritelja.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh al-Islam Ibn Taymiyyah pointed out that 'beautiful patience' is that which contains no complaint to creation, but rather involves seeking refuge in the Creator alone.

sentences.arabic: فَالصَّبْرُ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ كَفِّ النَّفْسِ عَنِ التَّسَخُّطِ، بَلْ هُوَ طُمَأْنِينَةٌ تَمْلَأُ القَلْبَ بِيَقِينٍ أَنَّ مَا أَخْطَأَكَ لَمْ يَكُنْ لِيُصِيبَكَ.
sentences.translation: Strpljenje nije samo suzdržavanje duše od negodovanja, već je to smiraj koji ispunjava srce ubjeđenjem da te ono što te je mimoišlo nije moglo pogoditi.
sentences.translationEn: Patience is not merely restraining the soul from discontent; it is a tranquility that fills the heart with the certainty that what missed you was never meant to strike you.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا أَنَّ الشُّكْرَ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ لَفْظٍ يَنْطِقُ بِهِ اللِّسَانُ، بَلْ هُوَ اسْتِعْمَالُ النِّعَمِ فِيمَا يُرْضِي المُنْعِمَ وَالِاعْتِرَافُ بِفَضْلِهِ سِرًّا وَجَهْرًا.
sentences.translation: Isto tako, zahvalnost nije samo riječ koju jezik izgovara, već je to korištenje blagodati u onome što zadovoljava Darovaoca i priznavanje Njegove dobrote tajno i javno.
sentences.translationEn: Likewise, gratitude is not just a word uttered by the tongue, but the utilization of blessings in what pleases the Bestower and the acknowledgment of His favor privately and publicly.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الحَيَاةَ بَيْنَ جَنَاحَيِ الصَّبْرِ وَالشُّكْرِ تَحْمِي المُسْلِمَ مِنْ غَائِلَةِ البَطَرِ عِنْدَ الرَّخَاءِ، وَمِنْ مَهَاوِي اليَأْسِ عِنْدَ البَلَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Život između krila strpljenja i zahvalnosti štiti muslimana od zla oholosti u blagostanju i od ponora očaja u iskušenju.
sentences.translationEn: Living between the two wings of patience and gratitude protects the Muslim from the peril of arrogance during prosperity and the abyss of despair during calamity.

sentences.arabic: وَبِذَلِكَ يَتَحَقَّقُ التَّوَازُنُ النَّفْسِيُّ الَّذِي يَنْشُدُهُ البَشَرُ، حَيْثُ يَعْلَمُ المُؤْمِنُ أَنَّ الدُّنْيَا دَارُ مَمَرٍّ لَا دَارُ مَقَرٍّ.
sentences.translation: Time se postiže psihološka ravnoteža kojoj teže ljudi, jer vjernik zna da je dunjaluk kuća prolaska, a ne kuća boravka.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the psychological balance sought by humanity is achieved, as the believer knows that this world is a place of passage, not a place of permanence.

sentences.arabic: وَهَكَذَا يَبْقَى المُؤْمِنُ شَامِخًا بِإِيمَانِهِ، رَاضِيًا بِقِسْمَةِ رَبِّهِ، مُتَطَلِّعًا إِلَى جَزَاءِ الصَّابِرِينَ الشَّاكِرِينَ فِي جَنَّاتِ النَّعِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Tako vjernik ostaje ponosan u svom imanu, zadovoljan onim što mu je Gospodar dodijelio, težeći nagradi strpljivih i zahvalnih u džennetima uživanja.
sentences.translationEn: In this way, the believer remains steadfast in faith, content with the Lord's distribution, looking forward to the reward of the patient and the grateful in the Gardens of Bliss.
